zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross於大約1310年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾奧列文時，他的父親David Lindsay Lord of Crawford12歲，母親Mary de Abernethy23歲。他於大約1363年與Euphemia Countess of Ross在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年2月27日在蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年73歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross于大约1310年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾奧列文时，他的父亲David Lindsay Lord of Crawford12岁，母亲Mary de Abernethy23岁。他于大约1363年与Euphemia Countess of Ross在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年2月27日在苏格兰培爾培斯享年73岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Leslie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a barony in Aberdeenshire, which is first recorded c. 1180 in the form Lesslyn, of obscure origin. Leslie in Fife is said to be named for this place; in some cases the surname may come from there.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Lecelin, a double diminutive of Lece. See Leece and Lesley .

History: The Scottish Clan Leslie claims descent from Bartolf, a Hungarian nobleman who came to Scotland in 1068 or 1070 in the retinue of Queen Margaret. She was an English princess who had been born and brought up in Hungary and who went on to marry King Malcolm III of Scotland. Members of the clan have held several titles in the peerage of Scotland, including Earl of Rothes (from 1437).

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Lesley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Leslie  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross was born about 1310, in Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, David Lindsay Lord of Crawford, was 12 and his mother, Mary de Abernethy, was 23. He married Euphemia Countess of Ross about 1363, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 27 February 1382, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross est né environ 1310, à Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, David Lindsay Lord of Crawford, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Mary de Abernethy, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Euphemia Countess of Ross environ 1363, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 février 1382, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross um 1310 in Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Lindsay Lord of Crawford 12 und seine Mutter Mary de Abernethy 23. Er hat um 1363 in Scotland Euphemia Countess of Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Februar 1382 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross è nato il circa 1310 nel Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, David Lindsay Lord of Crawford, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Abernethy, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Euphemia Countess of Ross circa 1363, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 febbraio 1382, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Rossが約1310年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアウチレベンで生まれた時，父David Lindsay Lord of Crawfordは12歳，母Mary de Abernethyは23歳であった。約1363年にスコットランドでEuphemia Countess of Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年2月27日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで73歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross(이)가 대략 1310년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 오클레븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Lindsay Lord of Crawford(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Abernethy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1363년 스컷랜드에서 Euphemia Countess of Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 2월 27일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Auchleven, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, David Lindsay Lord of Crawford, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Abernethy, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphemia Countess of Ross aproximadamente 1363, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1382, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross родился около 1310 г. в местности аучливен, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David Lindsay Lord of Crawford было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Abernethy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphemia Countess of Ross около 1363 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 февраля 1382 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
